message:
Parameterize ClusterRoleBinding name in dpctlr Helm chart (#240)

Use {{ .Release.Name }}-node-view instead of the hardcoded
dual-pods-controller-node-view for the ClusterRoleBinding name.
This prevents conflicts when multiple Helm releases coexist
(e.g., concurrent CI e2e test runs for different PRs).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@ metadata:
   labels:
     app.kubernetes.io/name: dual-pods
     app.kubernetes.io/component: controller
-  name: dual-pods-controller-node-view
+  name: "{{ .Release.Name }}-node-view"
 roleRef:
   apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
   kind: ClusterRole
